title: psydrax horizontalis
intro: Psydrax horizontalis, also known as the horizontal syzygium, is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Psydrax horizontalis typically involve extracting its leaves and using them in teas, infusions, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
